docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SCHOEPP, GREGORY J IND/DBA SCHOEPP CONSTRUCTION CO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $444.94 FILED BY MAZZARELLA, SCOTT IND & DBA MAZZY'S FIRE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHOEPP, GREGORY J IND/DBA SCHOEPP CONSTRUCTION CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCHOEPP, GREGORY J IND/DBA SCHOEPP CONSTRUCTION CO

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SCHOEPP, GREGORY J IND/DBA SCHOEPP CONSTRUCTION CO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MAZZARELLA, SCOTT IND & DBA MAZZY'S FIRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-19-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-21-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF WAIVED SERVICE OF PROCESS ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. DEFENDANT WAIVED DEFECTIVE SERVICE OF PROCESS ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAZZARELLA, SCOTT IND & DBA MAZZY'S FIRE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHOEPP, GREGORY J IND/DBA SCHOEPP CONSTRUCTION CO $379.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $419.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MAZZARELLA, SCOTT IND & DBA MAZZY'S FIRE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
